outcomeCode.REF-INT_CREATED: Split case created and referred internally
outcomeCode.REF-EXT_CREATED: Split case created and referred externally
outcomeCode.IRKB: Assigned to alternative help from Knowledgebase
outcomeCode.SPFM: Assigned to F2F provider (Debt, Education and Discrimination)
outcomeCode.SPFN: Assigned to F2F provider (Housing and Family)
outcomeCode.EDFF: Assigned to F2F provider (Education specialist providers not available)
outcomeCode.IRCB: Booked appointment with senior member of staff
outcomeCode.WROF: Write off case - use only under senior instruction
outcomeCode.CBSP: Will call back later for specialist
outcomeCode.MANREF: Manually allocated to Specialist for course-correction
outcomeCode.MIS-OOS: Client signposted to other help – not in scope
outcomeCode.MIS: Refer back to the operator service – not in scope
outcomeCode.DREFER: Arranged an appointment with a F2F specialist

categoryCode.immigration: Applying for asylum or permission to stay in the UK

text.CHILD_PATIENT: No, client is a child or patient
text.POWER_ATTORNEY: No, client is subject to power of attorney
text.NO_TELEPHONE_DISABILITY: No, client cannot communicate on the phone due to disability
text.NO_TELEPHONE_LANGUAGE: No, client cannot communicate on the phone due to a language requirement

financialDisregards.overseas_terrorism: Victims of Overseas Terrorism Compensation Scheme (VOTCS)

financialDisregards.energy_prices: The Energy Support Scheme payments (2022 and 2023)
financialDisregards.modern_slavery: Modern Slavery Victim Care Contract or National Referral Mechanism (NRM)

details.under18RegularPayment: Do you receive any money on a regular basis?
details.under18HasValuables: Do you have any savings, items of value or investments totalling £2500 or more?

finances.propertyValue: What is the current market value of the property?
finances.mortgageLeft: How much is left to pay on the mortgage?
finances.propertyShare: What percentage of the property do you and/or your partner own?
finances.savingsBalance: How much was in your bank account/building society before your last payment went in?
finances.investmentBalance: Do you have any investments, shares or ISAs?
finances.assetBalance: Do you have any valuable items worth over £500 each?
finances.creditBalance: Do you have any money owed to you?

finances.partnerInvestmentBalance: Does your partner have any investments, shares or ISAs?
finances.partnerAssetBalance: Does your partner have any valuable items worth over £500 each?
finances.partnerCreditBalance: Does your partner have any money owed to them?

income.earnings: What did you earn before tax? (Check your most recent payslips)
income.tax: How much tax do you pay?
income.nationalInsurance: How much National Insurance do you pay?
income.partnerEarnings: What did your partner earn before tax? (Check your most recent payslips)
income.partnerTax: How much tax does your partner pay?
income.partnerNationalInsurance: How much National Insurance does your partner pay?
income.dependantsYoung: Do you have any dependants aged 15 and under?
income.dependantsOld: Do you have any dependants aged 16 and over?

expenses.mortgageCost: How much do you pay for your mortgage?
expenses.rentCost: How much do you pay for rent? The amount entered should not include any housing benefit or payment for bills
expenses.maintenanceCost: How much maintenance have you paid during the last calendar month?
expenses.childCareCost: Do you have any childcare costs because of work or study? If so, how much?
expenses.legalAidCost: Are you currently paying towards legal aid for criminal defence? If so, how much have you paid in the last calendar month?
expenses.partnerMortgageCost: How much does your partner pay for their mortgage?
expenses.partnerRentCost: How much does your partner pay for their rent? The amount entered should not include any housing benefit or payment for bills
expenses.partnerMaintenanceCost: How much maintenance has your partner paid during the last calendar month?
expenses.partnerChildCareCost: Does your partner have any childcare costs because of work or study? If so, how much?
expenses.partnerLegalAidCost: Is your partner currently paying towards legal aid for criminal defence? If so, how much has your partner paid in the last calendar month?
